zh.lifeSummary: 當William Pierrepont於1160年出生在英國林可爾史爾霍利維爾時，他的父親Hugh de Pierrepont31歲，母親Clemence Rethel-54歲。他和Mrs. William DePierrepont至少有3個兒子。他去世於1224年在英國素可賀爾斯皮爾波特享年64歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭素福爾可斯托克 白 易普斯維其。

nameMeanings.name: Pierrepont
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

en.lifeSummary: When William Pierrepont was born in 1160, in Holywell, Lincolnshire, England, his father, Hugh de Pierrepont, was 31 and his mother, Clemence Rethel, was -54. He had at least 3 sons with Mrs. William DePierrepont. He died in 1224, in Hurstpierpoint, Sussex, England, at the age of 64, and was buried in Stoke by Ipswich, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom.

Er hatte mit Mrs. William DePierrepont mindestens 3 Söhne. Er starb 1224 im Alter von 64 Jahren in Hurstpierpoint, Sussex, England und wurde in Stoke by Ipswich, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom begraben.

ko.Stoke Neyland Church, County Suffolk, En: 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 스토크 비 이프스위치
ko.lifeSummary: William Pierrepont(이)가 1160년 영국 링코실르 홀이웰에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Hugh de Pierrepont(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Clemence Rethel(은)는 -54세였다. 그는 Mrs. William DePierrepont(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1224년 영국 수세스 허스트피르포인트에서 64세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 스토크 비 이프스위치에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Pierrepont родился в 1160 г. в местности холивелл, линколншир, Англия, его отцу по имени Hugh de Pierrepont было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Clemence Rethel, -54. У него было по крайней мере 3 сына от Mrs. William DePierrepont. Он умер в 1224 г. в местности хурстпьирпоинт, суссекс, Англия в возрасте 64 лет и был похоронен в местности сток би ипсвич, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания.
